description: A screenshot of a New York Post mobile web article rather than an agency-designed graphic. At the top is the red New York Post header bar with hamburger and envelope icons and a 'LOG IN' link. A red all-caps pull-quote headline reads "'YOU'RE NOT SCARING ME'". Below is a three-photo collage of DHS Secretary Kristi Noem participating in an ICE operation: at left she stands in tactical body armor marked 'ICE' holding a clipboard beside masked agents in front of a house numbered 15; top-right shows agents in tactical gear arresting/handcuffing a man outdoors; bottom-right shows Noem being handed or inspecting a rifle/long gun by an armored vehicle. A red 'EXCLUSIVE' tag precedes the bold black headline 'Kristi Noem dodges kicks from migrant suspect as she leads ICE deportation raids in Phoenix,' with a gray standfirst: 'Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty on President Trump's deportation raids.' A second red-arrow teaser reads 'More than 900K migrants who entered US with Biden-era CBP One app told to self-deport.' This is reposted media coverage glorifying Noem's hands-on participation in raids; minimal custom DHS design, so marked not a designed meme. Target audience: general public and supporters.
notable_text: 'YOU'RE NOT SCARING ME'; Kristi Noem dodges kicks from migrant suspect as she leads ICE deportation raids in Phoenix; More than 900K migrants who entered US with Biden-era CBP One app told to 'self-deport'
